customAttributes.description:
My Little Pony: Friendship is Magic

At the beginning of your upkeep, if an opponent controls three or more creatures, sacrifice this enchantment, search your library for up to two creature cards, put those cards onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in Secret Lair x My Little Pony: Friendship is Magic and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 6/20/2026 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
customAttributes.flavorText:
“Do you know you’re all my very best friends?”
—Twilight Sparkle
